param/command.v
`define RAM_MODEL ram_only
に変更

ram_only.v もいらない部分をコメントアウト


RTL/xbar.v
  ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
  // Weight RAM instantiation
  ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
  genvar gi;
  generate
    for (gi = 0; gi < NEURAL_ARRAY_WIDTH; gi = gi + 1) begin : GEN_RAM
`ifdef __FPGA__
      xilinx_mem_1024x8 R0 (
        .clka(clk),
        .rsta(1'b0),
        .ena(1'b1),
        .addra(addr0),
        .dina(data_1[(gi+1)*WEIGHT_WIDTH-1:gi*WEIGHT_WIDTH]),
        .douta(o_wspike[(gi+1)*WEIGHT_WIDTH-1:gi*WEIGHT_WIDTH]),
        .wea(w_have_spk | r_swvalid)
      );
`else
      `RAM_MODEL R0 (
        .clk0(clk),
        .csb0(1'b0),
        .web0(web0),
        .addr0(addr0),
        .din0(data_1[(gi+1)*WEIGHT_WIDTH-1:gi*WEIGHT_WIDTH]),
        .dout_mux(o_wspike[(gi+1)*WEIGHT_WIDTH-1:gi*WEIGHT_WIDTH]),
        .rst_n(rst_n) // Added
      );
`endif
    end
  endgenerate

に変更する

1_gan_simulation.tcl
set RTL_DIR {./RTL}
set PARAM_DIR {./PARAM}
set TB_DIR {./TB}

set INC "+incdir+$PARAM_DIR"

# OpenRAM 関連のパスを追加
set OPENRAM_DIR {/home/s1310244/OpenRAM_test/src}
set OPENRAM_LIB_DIR_512 {/home/s1310244/OpenRAM_test/output_sp_w8_b512_freepdk45}
set OPENRAM_LIB_DIR_256 {/home/s1310244/OpenRAM_test/output_sp_w8_b256_freepdk45}

# PARAM
vlog -vlog01compat -work work $PARAM_DIR/common.v
vlog -vlog01compat -work work $PARAM_DIR/LIF.v

# RTL
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $RTL_DIR/LIF_neuron.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $RTL_DIR/SNN_Slave_If_v1_1_S00_AXI.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $RTL_DIR/SNN_top.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $RTL_DIR/SNN_wrapper.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $RTL_DIR/SNPC.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $RTL_DIR/SNPC_cntrl.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $RTL_DIR/SNPC_top.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $RTL_DIR/spike_counter.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $RTL_DIR/spike_rom.v

# Modify at a block
# vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $RTL_DIR/sram_sp_w8_b1024_freepdk45.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $OPENRAM_DIR/ram_only.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $OPENRAM_LIB_DIR_512/sram_sp_w8_b512_freepdk45.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $OPENRAM_LIB_DIR_256/sram_sp_w8_b256_freepdk45.v
###

vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $RTL_DIR/weights_l1_rom.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $RTL_DIR/weights_l2_rom.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $RTL_DIR/weights_l3_rom.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $RTL_DIR/bias_l1_rom.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $RTL_DIR/bias_l2_rom.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $RTL_DIR/bias_l3_rom.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $RTL_DIR/xbar.v

# TB
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $TB_DIR/tb_bias_l1_rom.v
vlog -vlog01compat $INC -work work $TB_DIR/tb_SNN_wrapper_csv.v

#SIM
vsim -t 1ps -voptargs="+acc"  work.tb_SNN_wrapper_csv
run 0
add wave /*
run -all

pythonのバージョンが2.7.5なのでの
print(f"Image saved to: {output_path}")
が認識できないので書き換えて
print("Image saved to: " + str(output_path))
こうする
